# Video Generation Module

Module ID: video-generation
Status: draft
Purpose: Provider-neutral async video generation jobs, provider task state, reference metadata, and output records.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Primary service: createVideoGenerationService
Stores: createVideoGenerationMemoryStore, createD1VideoGenerationStore
Check: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/video-generation check:spec
Build: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/video-generation build
Test: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/video-generation test

Boundaries:
- Owns task state, normalized statuses, and output metadata.
- Does not own provider secrets, billing, rate limits, moderation, auth, R2 byte downloads, signed URLs, or UI.
- Provider submission is possible only through an injected VideoGenerationProvider port.
